# CogFun Success Box (v0.1)
Digitalizing the "Success Box" for ADHD Cognitive-Functional therapy.

## Current State
- Vite + React + TS scaffolded.
- UI-First development phase.
- No backend integrated yet.

## Desired Architecture
- src/components/ui: Generic, reusable components.
- src/features/parent: Entry buttons and preset logic.
- src/features/kid: Dashboard and "Mr." summary cards.
- src/types: Domain types for CogFun agents and notes.
